services.name: Brand Identity

testimonials.name: Sarah Mitchell
testimonials.text: Next-Gen Creative completely transformed my brand. The logo was exactly what I envisioned but couldn't describe. Delivered in 24 hours — phenomenal quality.

testimonials.name: Ahmed Karimi
testimonials.text: We needed a full brand kit in 48 hours for a product launch. They delivered on time and the quality blew us away. Conversion rate jumped 40% after the rebrand!

testimonials.name: Layla Rodriguez
testimonials.text: The social media pack they created got engagement we'd never seen before. Clients constantly ask who designs our visuals. The answer is always Next-Gen Creative.

about.title: We Make Your Brand Unforgettable
about.p1: Next-Gen Creative is a premium design studio specializing in brand identity, digital graphics, and visual storytelling. We believe that great design isn't just art — it's a powerful business tool.
about.p2: Every pixel is intentional. Every color carries meaning. We craft designs that don't just look good but convert viewers into loyal customers.

features.title: Fast Turnaround
features.desc: Most projects delivered within 24–72 hours without sacrificing quality.

features.title: Unlimited Revisions
features.desc: We iterate until you're 100% satisfied. Your vision is our priority.

features.title: All File Formats
features.desc: AI, PSD, EPS, SVG, PNG, PDF — ready for any use case.

footer.description: Designs that define brands. We turn your vision into visual impact that drives results.
